entities.name: GROUNDNUT
entities.description: Arachis hypogaea L., the crop studied for seed quality traits under drought stress

entities.name: OIL CONTENT
entities.description: The total amount of oil present in groundnut seeds

entities.name: PROTEIN CONTENT
entities.description: The total amount of protein present in groundnut seeds

entities.name: FATTY ACID CONTENT
entities.description: The composition and levels of various fatty acids in groundnut seeds

entities.name: DROUGHT
entities.description: Water deficit stress imposed on the crop

entities.name: MID-SEASON DROUGHT
entities.description: Drought stress imposed between 40 and 80 days after sowing

entities.name: END-OF-SEASON DROUGHT
entities.description: Drought stress imposed from 80 days after sowing until harvest

entities.name: ICRISAT ASIA CENTER
entities.description: Research facility in Patancheru, India where the experiments were conducted

entities.name: LINE-SOURCE SPRINKLER TECHNIQUE
entities.description: A method used to impose end-of-season drought of varying intensity

entities.name: EICOSENOIC FATTY ACID
entities.description: A specific fatty acid affected by mid-season drought

entities.name: LINOLEIC FATTY ACID
entities.description: A specific fatty acid reduced by end-of-season drought

entities.name: BEHENIC FATTY ACID
entities.description: A specific fatty acid reduced by end-of-season drought

entities.name: STEARIC FATTY ACID
entities.description: A specific fatty acid increased by end-of-season drought

entities.name: OLEIC FATTY ACID
entities.description: A specific fatty acid increased by end-of-season drought

entities.name: ICGV GENOTYPES
entities.description: Specific groundnut genotypes (88369, 88371, 88381, 88382, 88403) showing stability in oil content

entities.name: RAINFED CULTIVATION
entities.description: Agricultural production relying on rainfall rather than irrigation
